results.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer (Match Group AI) at Matchgroup · JobsRadar
highlights:
Senior Machine Learning Engineer (Match Group AI) at Matchgroup · JobsRadar
...
Jobs› Companies› Matchgroup› Senior Machine Learning Engineer (Match Group AI)
...
## About this Senior Machine Learning Engineer (Match Group AI) role at Matchgroup
...
ML Team은 Match Group의 다양한 서비스에 AI/ML 기술을 적용하는 ML Engineer로 구성된 팀입니다. 팀의 업무는 실제 제품이 만들어지고 운영되는 과정에서 발생하는 문제를 발굴하고 정의하는 것에서 시작됩니다. 문제 해결에 가장 적합한 SotA(State-of-the-Art) 모델을 개발하거나 재현하고, 완성된 모델을 모바일과 서버 환경에 안정적이고 효율적으로 배포합니다. 이후에도 지속적인 모니터링과 개선을 통해 서비스의 AI Flywheel을 구축해 나갑니다. 이 과정에서 백엔드/프론트엔드/DevOps 엔지니어, 데이터 분석가, PM 등 다양한 전문 조직과 긴밀히 협업하며 실제 사용자에게 임팩트를 주는 AI 경험을 만들어갑니다. 일하는 모습에 대한 조금 더 자세한 이야기는 다음의 내용을 참고하시면 좋습니다.
...
ML 연구가 잘 진행되기 위해서는 딥러닝 학습을 위한 인프라도 잘 갖추어져야합니다. ML engineer들이 충분히 모델 개발 및 실험을 진행할 수 있도록 자체 딥러닝 클러스터(총 160대 A100 GPU, 40대 H100 GPU)를 보유하고 있습니다. 추가적으로, 데이터 수집, 전처리를 포함한 자체적인 데이터 파이프라인을 클라우드 서비스를 활용하여 구축 및 운영하고 있습니다. 또, ML 모델의 제품화를 도와주실 다양한 software engineer(백엔드/프론트엔드/DevOps/MLSE)분들과 함께 일하고 있습니다.
...
Match Group AI의 ML Engineer는 최신 AI/ML 기술을 연구하고 적용하는 과학자이자, 실제 서비스 환경에 맞게 모델 및 시스템을 설계하고 최적화하는 엔지니어입니다. 조직에서는 다음과 같은 다양한 업무들을 담당하고 있으며, 이들 중 적어도 한 가지 업무에 대해서 능숙하게 수행하실 수 있는 분을 찾고 있습니다.
...
- Match Group에서 서비스 중인 제품들에서 발생하는 다양한 비즈니스 문제를 해결합니다. 비즈니스 문제의 배경, 목표, 제약사항 등을 파악하여 올바른 AI/ML 문제로 재정의하고, 이를 해결하기 위한 최선의 방법론을 찾아 문제를 해결하는 과정을 수행합니다.
...
- Match Group의 새로운 제품 및 기능 개발에 참여합니다. 아이디어 구상부터 프로토타이핑, 실제 사용자에게 도달하기까지의 과정에서 AI/ML 기술들을 활용하여 제품 및 기능을 빠르고 올바르게 구현하는 과정을 수행합니다.
...
- 대규모 언어 모델(large language models) 및 멀티모달 모델(multimodal models) 선행연구 및 개발을 담당합니다. Match Group의 데이터와 최신 기술들을 활용하여 데이팅 도메인에 특화된 모델을 만들고, 제품의 다양한 영역에 적용시킬 수 있는 방법을 찾아가는 과정을 수행합니다.
...
위 업무들을 수행하기 위해 Sr. ML Engineer에게는 탄탄한 AI/ML 기초 지식과 빠른 최신 기술 습득을 기반으로 팀의 기술적 의사결정을 이끌어 갈 수 있는 역량을 기대합니다. 이러한 역량을 기반으로 주로 다음과 같은 기술적인 주제들을 주도하게 됩니다.
...
- 텍스트, 이미지, 이벤트 로그 등을 포함하여 다양한 modality를 가진 데이터를 올바르게 다루는 방법 및 수집된 데이터의 편향 및 노이즈를 올바르게 해소하는 방법

- 제품의 목표와 정렬된 평가 지표 정의 및 목표 달성을 위한 최적의 모델 학습 방법

- 엔지니어링 제약사항 및 인프라 환경을 고려한 온디바이스 및 대규모 모델 추론 최적화 방법

results.title: Match Group AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Match Group has positioned itself as a leader in AI transformation within the dating industry, making substantial investments to revitalize user engagement across its portfolio. The company has established a dedicated AI innovation team called 'Art x Science Lab' (ASL) led by Mark Kantor as VP of Innovation[1]. Match Group has partnered with OpenAI to secure over 1,000 ChatGPT Enterprise licenses for employees[2], and is investing $20-30 million annually in AI initiatives[3]. Under CEO Spencer Rascoff, the company is undergoing a major reorganization focused on product-led innovation, with AI at the center of its three-phase transformation strategy[4]. The company views AI as 'existential to the future of Match Group' and plans to integrate it across the entire dating experience, from profile creation to matching and post-match interactions[5].
...

### OpenAI Enterprise Partnership
...
Strategic partnership providing AI tools for Match Group employees
...
Over 1,000 ChatGPT Enterprise licenses for employee productivity in communications, coding, design, analysis, and template building. Includes mandatory training for responsible AI use.
...
Match Group is going steady with AI, appoints Zynga alum to lead AI-focused team
...
How is Match Group using AI across its dating apps?
...
Match Group is integrating AI across the entire dating experience including profile creation, photo selection, conversation starters, matching algorithms, and safety features. Major apps like Tinder and Hinge have launched AI-powered features to improve user engagement.
...
What is Match Group's investment in AI?
...
Match Group is investing $20-30 million annually in AI initiatives and has partnered with OpenAI for over 1,000 enterprise licenses. The company views AI as 'existential to the future' of their business.

results.title: Anthony BERTON
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist | Applied AI & ML Products | Personalization, GenAI, Computer Vision, GCP
...
Senior Data Scientist Applied AI & ML Products at [Match Group](https://www.linkedin.com/company/matchgroup)
...
Senior Data Scientist with 10+ years of experience designing and scaling AI-driven products, machine learning systems and business-facing analytics across tech/digital and consulting environments. At Meetic / Match Group, I lead and contribute to cross-brand AI initiatives focused on monetization personalization, scoring, experimentation, and creative intelligence. Over the past few years, I have grown into a trusted reference point on monetization and scoring topics, while acting as a bridge between Paris and Vancouver teams to support model migration, knowledge sharing, and cross-domain execution. My work combines predictive modeling, stakeholder partnership, and increasing product ownership across the AI lifecycle. I enjoy turning complex ML topics into concrete products, scalable, business-usable solutions: recommendation systems, promotion and pricing models, churn and profiling uses cases, computer vision, fraud / bad-behavior detection, and AI-powered insight tools. Most recently, I built Insight Extraction tool, a Streamlit-based AI application that helps cross-sell and creative teams understand ad performance, identify high-performing audience segments, generate human-readable insights, and explore new ad concepts through agentic AI workflows. My current focus is at the intersection of: - Applied AI products - GenAI / agentic workflows - Personalization and recommendation - Computer Vision + NLP - AI explainability, experimentation, and performance monitoring (GCP) - Cross-functional leadership across product, engineering, and analytics I also won the 2025 Meetic Hackathon with Resonance, an Voice AI-driven prototype developed with a cross-functional team, reinforcing my interest in building innovative AI products from idea to impact. Tech: Python, AI, GCP, Computer Vision, NLP, Machine Learning, Spark, Scala Ways of working: Agile collaboration, stakeholder management, mentoring, project leadership, French & English communication Interested in scalable AI / GenAI systems, evaluation frameworks, explainability, and production-oriented AI workflows
...

...
At Match Group / Meetic, I work on cross-brand machine learning and AI initiatives to improve monetization, customer experience, and creative performance across the portfolio.
...
- Lead and support cross-brand data science initiatives focused on predictive modeling, personalization, monetization, and scoring strategy across multiple brands on GCP.
...
- Act as a key bridge between Paris and Vancouver teams on ML/AI topics, especially around score migration, knowledge sharing, and execution across brands.
...
- Contributed to model migration and monitoring topics on GCP, improving scalability and readiness for future AI/ML features.
...
- Explore new AI / GenAI capabilities, including AI-agent approaches and code-driven documentation concepts, with a focus on business usability and operational value. Selected projects:
...
- Insight Extraction tool — AI-powered ad performance and creative intelligence platform Built a Streamlit application for the cross-sell team to understand ad performance, identify which creatives work best for which audience segments, generate AI-powered executive summaries, compare top vs. bottom creatives visually, and explore new ad concepts through an AI agentic workflow. Stack: Python, Polars, Streamlit, GCP, Computer Vision Won the 2025 Meetic Hackathon with Resonance, rallying a cross-functional team around an AI-driven Voice based concept and delivering a winning prototype

### https://www.linkedin.com/posts/nbetg_agenticai-artificialintelligence-datascience-activity-7440503411428659200-6P3S
...
Excited to share that I’ve successfully completed the Agentic AI: 2.5 Week Intensive from the Harvard Data Science Initiative!
...
This program has been an incredibly enriching deep dive into how AI is evolving from passive models to agentic systems that can reason, plan, and act.
...
Here are a few key takeaways from the course:
...
• Understanding the fundamentals of Agentic AI architectures and how they differ from traditional automations
...
• Designing AI agents that can plan, execute tasks, and iterate based on feedback
...
• Hands-on exposure to tool-augmented LLMs, workflows, and decision-making systems
...
• Learning how to build real-world applications using agent-based approaches
...
• Exploring the ethical considerations and guardrails required for deploying autonomous AI systems
...
This experience has strengthened my perspective on how AI can move beyond predictions to become action oriented and outcome driven, and I’m excited to apply these concepts in real world problem solving.
...
A big thank you to the incredible faculty and team at Harvard Data Science Initiative and DAIN studios for curating such a practical and forward-looking program, and for fostering an engaging learning environment. OpenAI's team relies on the auto and self-learning of the agent. They don't mention any semantic layer. No specific pre-defined skills. But: they insist on the memory piece, where the agent learns continuously from user feedback. And the analysis processes are created by users directly as saved workflows. Finally, context is maintained automatically, by daily profiling and AI annotations of tables.

for me that's proof that there's not one way to build agentic analytics.

### https://www.
...

...
/msmullins_when-a-frontier-ai-lab-builds-its-own-analytics-activity-7468633899988955136-_io7
...
Activity: Gabriel Flores
...
Anthropic has no dog in the fight over AI data infrastructure, but even they recognize the importance of semantic intelligence, like Coginiti , for using agents for analytics. 

You don’t have to just take our word for it 🙂 Anthropic ran an experiment most vendors would never publish.
...
Their conclusion: the bottleneck for trustworthy self-service analytics was never access to context. It was structure — the ability to map a question to the one correct, governed entity. That's the entire case for a semantic layer, demonstrated by the team building the frontier models, with no commercial reason to demonstrate it.

building. #

### https://www.linkedin.com/posts/joaoaugustodev_softwareengineering-ai-specdrivendevelopment-activity-7459369336084889600-0OXk
...
Activity: João Augusto
...
If you've used Claude Code, Cursor, or any AI coding agent beyond a quick script, you've hit this pattern: you describe a feature, the AI generates several hundred lines that look correct, and hours later you're untangling code that subtly missed your actual intent.
...
This isn't an AI failure.
...
's a
...
The fix has a name: Spec-Driven Development. It inverts the traditional workflow — instead of code being the artifact and docs trying to keep up, the specification becomes the source of truth, and code, tests, and docs are generated from it.
...
I wrote a practical guide for engineers covering the theory behind SDD, the four-phase workflow that works with any AI agent (Specify → Plan → Tasks → Implement), EARS notation for writing requirements that AI can actually execute, a complete worked example using Claude Code with the exact folder structure, CLAUDE template, and custom slash commands you can copy, and the failure modes nobody warns you about.
...
, product,
...
.in/
...
qJq_

### https://www.linkedin.com/posts/spencerrascoff_1mg-matchgroup-activity-7463252874412666880-72l7
...
Activity: Christina March reacted on this
...
Yesterday we gave our entire company one job: build with AI.
...
No meetings. Calendars cleared. 14 offices and 2200 employees across the Americas, Europe, and Asia — all working on the same question: how can you use AI to make something you work on better and faster?
...
Teams from every corner of Match Group participated — legal, finance, engineering, customer care, operations and more. There were 411 video submissions of AI projects by the end of the day.
...
Congrats to our three regional winners who each walked away with $1,000 in Anthropic credits:
...
APAC: Hanc Noh, Sr. Software Engineer, Backend ( Tinder )
EMEA: Thibaut Lemonnier , Sr. Product Designer (E&E)
Americas: Vitalii Miller , Sr. Engineer II, iOS and Maria Knabe , Senior Engineer II, Software (E&E)
...
We're in the business of helping people connect. That takes a lot of people doing a lot of thoughtful work. Yesterday was about giving those people better tools to do it -- using AI in service of human connection, not as a replacement for it.
...
A huge thank you to everyone who organized a global event of this scale. No small feat. Alex Yeoman , Anukool Kumar , Cindy Caviedes , David Joseph Edgar Campa, Erica N. , Evan Rosenfield, Frank Ren , Harue Hirayama , Jessica Garcia , Jessica Lommel Salcido , T. Jordan Fricks , Kate Dowling , Ksenia Kostyan , Kyle Boss , Kyle Osborn, Manon Gomes , Matt Scifo, Noah Cort , Octavio Medina, Shintaro Kaneko , Summer E., Thomas Diavet , UJ (UIJONG) CHOI , Vinay Kuruvila . Plus teams: AV, Global Workplace, IT, Legal, and Sec Engineering.

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote)
...
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity)
...
Department: Data Science
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Inference: Partner with inference data scientists to conduct rigorous quantitative analyses, applying working knowledge of causal inference to interpret results, assess impact, and identify gaps and opportunities to improve content quality and trust outcomes.
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. This list is continuously evolving, so please check back with us if the state you live in is on the exclusion list. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.

results.title: Senior / Principal Data Scientist, Matchmaking | Wfh
highlights:
Senior / Principal Data Scientist, Matchmaking | Wfh
...
# Senior / Principal Data Scientist, Matchmaking
...
WHY DATA SCIENCE & ANALYTICS? The Data Science & Analytics organization's mission is to increase our speed, frequency and acumen of making decisions at scale by instilling a data-influenced approach to building products. We cover a wide area of the data spectrum including analytical data engineering, product analytics, experimentation, causal inference, statistical modeling and machine learning. Aligned and partnering with product verticals, we use this extensive tool belt to discover new opportunities and unmet use cases, influence and shape the product roadmap and prioritization, build data products and measure impact on our community of players and developers. WHY MATCHMAKING? Every day, millions of players explore immersive worlds created by our global community. Our mission is to optimize these connections at an unprecedented scale - matching each player to the most engaging experience, in real time, across a dynamic global ecosystem. As a Senior/Principal Data Scientist on the Matchmaking team, you'll help shape the future of how our community discovers, connects, and plays together, solving some of the most challenging optimization and systems problems in the industry. Matchmaking is the foundational system that connects millions of users to tens of thousands of experiences across our global platform infrastructure. You'll partner with engineers, infrastructure teams, and product leaders to solve some of the most complex optimization problems in the industry. Your work will span from low-level resource allocation algorithms to high-level capacity planning strategies. You will define KPIs and measure the impact of matchmaking improvements while discovering optimization opportunities through advanced analytics, modeling, and experimentation. This role sits at the intersection of cutting-edge operations research, large-scale systems engineering, and user experience optimization. You Will: • Design and optimize large-scale matching algorithms to connect millions of users with thousands of experiences in real time. • Define and track matchmaking performance metrics that directly improve user satisfaction and system efficiency. • Build scalable monitoring and analytics systems for continuous evaluation and root cause analysis. • Partner with engineering and infrastructure teams to implement high-performance, low-latency matchmaking pipelines. • Develop and deploy advanced optimization models using state-of-the-art mathematical frameworks and large-scale telemetry data. • Validate and iterate on improvements through rigorous experimentation and causal inference. • Collaborate with our developer community to create transparent and customizable matchmaking solutions that empower creators. • Influence platform strategy and contribute as a technical thought leader to advance Roblox's global ecosystem. You Have: • Advanced Degree and/or PhD in Operations Research, Computer Science, Statistics, Applied Mathematics, Industrial Engineering, or other related quantitative fields • 6+ years of relevant industry experience with marketplace optimization, auction systems, or large-scale matching platforms (e.g., ride-sharing, ad exchanges, trading systems) • Strong optimization systems experience including mathematical modeling, solver integration, and production deployment of marketplace or allocation algorithms • Demonstrated ability to drive optimization initiatives as an individual contributor and technical thought leader • Experience with real-time bidding, dynamic pricing, or resource allocation systems in high-throughput environments • Experience collaborating with Infrastructure teams to optimize system performance and resource utilization (a plus) • Ability to communicate optimization results and algorithmic insights to influence engineering teams and business stakeholders

results.title: Director, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning | Wfh
highlights:
Director, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning | Wfh
...
# Director, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
...
### About the role:
...
Angi is seeking an exceptional Director, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning to be a driving force behind Angi's transformation. The role is to be a leader in our Artificial Intelligence team, tackling challenges such as integrating Angi's search with LLM Providers like OpenAI GPT and Google Gemini. This is a leadership role, leading a team of dedicated machine learning engineers to both develop ML prototypes and then take them to production. In addition to being a leader, we're also looking for someone who can dive into tech and get their hands dirty to solve some of Angi's biggest technical challenges.
...
- Leadership: Lead and grow a team of talented machine learning engineers, providing guidance, mentorship, and support to foster professional growth. For our most complex challenges, you will dive into the tech to work through solutioning alongside your team.
...
- LLM Deployment and Optimization: Oversee the fine-tuning and deployment of LLMs, including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in an agentic framework, with a focus on optimizing model performance and scalability to enhance user experience and drive business results.
...
- Integration with 3rd Party AI APIs: Oversee the integration and management of AI tools and third-party solutions, including OpenAI GPT, Google Gemini, Meta AI, and Salesforce AI, to enhance user experience and business performance.
...
- Engineering & Product Collaboration: Partner with engineering, product, and design teams to build robust, scalable real-time APIs, and work on the entire development process to seamlessly integrate AI solutions into our products.
...
- Innovation: Foster innovation within the team, exploring new approaches and techniques to solve complex business problems.
...
- Who you are
...
- You have a Master's or Ph.D. in a computer science or quantitative field (e.g., Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or related fields).
- You have 10+ years of experience in machine learning & engineering, with a focus on large-scale distributed application architecture for deploying ML models to production.
- You are an expert in machine learning deployment, API development, and real-time ML workloads.
- You are proficient in Python and comfortable diving deep into technical challenges alongside your team.
...
- You have excellent communication skills with the ability to convey complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
...
Our hiring process may utilize artificial intelligence (AI) tools to assist in candidate screening and assessment. Our AI tools are designed to complement, not replace, human decision-making.

results.title: Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
highlights:
Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
...
# Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization
...
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence are at the heart of the Airbnb product. From Trust to Payments, and from Customer Service to Marketing we rely on ML to ensure that guests and hosts have the best possible experience with Airbnb.
...
The CS AI product team is responsible for driving CSxAI (Customer Support x Artificial Intelligence) initiatives by adopting the Generative AI technologies to enable an intelligent, scalable and exceptional service experience. The team develops and enhances various AI models, ML services and tools including LLM fine-tuning, alignment and optimization, RAG/Search, LLM evaluation and testing automation, feedback-based learning and guardrail for a wide range of applications in Airbnb.
...
As a principal machine learning engineer, you will be responsible for fine-tuning state-of-the-art LLMs for diverse use cases while optimizing models for high-performance deployment on Airbnb’s ML Infrastructure. You will partner with product managers, software engineers, data scientists and operation teams to brainstorm, design and develop AI products such as AI Assistant, Autonomous agent, recommendation, travel planning, and many more products that make meaningful impacts in the world of travel.
...
- Work with large scale structured and unstructured data; explore, experiment, build and continuously improve foundation models for Airbnb product, business and operational use cases.
...
- Create a multi-year tech roadmap that enables our team to stay on the leading edge of the rapidly evolving AI landscape and leverage the best in class technologies to deliver customer benefits.
...
- Continuously evaluate recent and upcoming large foundational models, ensuring the selection and refinement of the highest quality models for enhanced performance and efficiency.
...
- Hands-on prototype, develop and productionize LLM models and pipelines at scale, including both batch and real-time use cases.
...
- Drive key AI architectural decisions for products, and contribute to Airbnb’s ML platform architecture and strategy.
...
- Minimum Qualifications:
...
- PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Statistics, or related technical field.
...
- 10+ years of experience with developing machine learning models and products at scale from inception to business impact.
...
- Programming experience in Python and hands-on experience with frameworks such as PyTorch.
...
- Proven record of training, fine tuning, optimizing models and inference run-time
...
- Post-training experience in areas like data processing for fine-tuning; responsible LLMs; LLM alignment; reinforcement learning; efficient training and inference; language model evaluation; and/or multilingual and multimodal modeling.
...
- Or specialized experience in runtime optimizations, model quantization, compression, on-device inference, GPU inference, pytorch, kernel development
...
- Preferred Qualifications:
...
- PhD in AI, machine learning, data science, or related technical fields.
...
- Publications at peer-reviewed AI conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, CVPR, ICML, ICLR, ICCV, and ACL).
...
- Customer Support Systems: Experience with AI technologies in customer support applications.
...
- Agile Practice for AI production: Experience with the entire AI product development lifecycle from incubation to production at scale, following agile practices in the Applied AI/ML domain.

results.title: Senior NLP / LLM Engineer | Hirenixa
highlights:
NLP / LLM Engineer

Remote, USA

Posted Jul 2, 2026

Full-time

 Social Discovery Group (SDG) is one of the world's largest groups of social discovery companies, uniting millions of users on dozens of products. SDG solves the problem of loneliness, isolation, and disconnection - transforming virtual intimacy into the new normal. SDG products redefine the way people interact and connect with each other.  Our portfolio includes social entertainment platforms designed to connect people online across different cultures in different parts of the world. This includes globally recognized brands such as DateMyAge, Dating.com, EuroDate, Dil Mil and Cupid Media. SDG has a presence in more than 150 countries. We bring together a team of like-minded people and IT professionals specializing in the creation and development of globally impactful social discovery products. Our international team of 1000+ professionals and digital nomads works all over the world. Our teams of digital nomads work remotely from Cyprus, Malta, the USA, Armenia, Georgia, Kazakhstan, Montenegro, Poland, Latvia, Serbia, Spain, Portugal, UAE,  Israel, Turkey, Thailand, Indonesia, Japan, Hong Kong, Australia and many other locations. We’re proud to be a two-time “Great Place to Work” winner (USA & Japan, 2024–2025) and a Top-5 Company for Work-From-Anywhere Jobs (FlexJobs, 2025).  We are looking for a Senior NLP Engineer. Your main tasks will be: 

 Conduct experiments with LLMs and evaluate different architectures and techniques (SFT, RLHF, Adapters, etc.) To improve conversational AI quality; Develop and maintain robust evaluation frameworks to assess model performance, accuracy, and user satisfaction using offline and online metrics; Optimize models for inference, improving speed, efficiency, and scalability for production environments; Fine-tune and adapt large language models using approaches such as LoRA, QLoRA, prompt/prefix tuning, and instruction tuning; Collaborate closely with Data Scientists, Software Engineers, and Product Managers to integrate AI solutions into the product pipeline; Participate in improving deployment and inference stack, including evaluation of serving frameworks such as vLLM and SGLang. We expect from you: Strong hands-on experience with LLM fine-tuning and adaptation techniques such as SFT, LoRA, QLoRA and etc. Practical experience in training and improving NLP / LLM models, not only integrating third-party APIs or building RAG pipelines; Deep understanding of Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and classical NLP concepts; Experience with transformer-based architectures and modern NLP/LLM model development workflows; Understanding of model evaluation methodologies, offline/online metrics, and experimentation frameworks; Experience with inference optimization, quantization, and deployment/serving frameworks such as vLLM, SGLang, or similar; Strong Python skills and practical experience with ML frameworks such as PyTorch, Transformers, NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn; Good understanding of software engineering best practices and production-oriented development mindset; English level B2+. What do we offer: REMOTE OPPORTUNITY  to work full-time; Vacation  28 calendar days per year; 7 wellness days per year  (time off) that can be used to deal with household issues, to lie down and recover without taking sick leave; Bonuses up to $5000  for recommending successful applicants for positions in the company; 50%  payment for professional training, international conferences, and meetings; Corporate discount for  English lessons; ​ Health benefits.  According to the paychecks, if you are not eligible for corporate medical insurance, the company will compensate you with up to $ 1,000 gross per year per employee. This can be spent on self-purchase of health insurance or on doctor’s fees for yourself and close relatives (spouse, children); ​ Workplace organization.  The company provides all employees with an equipped workplace

Product & Technology · Basel Office - MDPI Headquarters
...
# Data Scientist (100%)
...
## Drive innovation in machine learning and AI, from research to deployment, creating scalable intelligent systems that power the next generation of scientific discovery.
...
Are you passionate about turning complex data into intelligent, production-ready solutions while supporting the future of open-access science? We are looking for a Data Scientist to join our team and help design, develop, and deploy advanced machine learning solutions that power intelligent, data-driven products. This role focuses on NLP, recommender systems, and agentic LLM workflows, turning complex business challenges into scalable and impactful analytical solutions.
...
This is an opportunity to work at the forefront of machine learning and AI, contributing to innovative systems that leverage state-of-the-art research in practical applications.
...
Core Responsibilities
...
Design, develop, and evaluate machine learning and statistical models, with a focus on NLP, recommender systems, and LLM-based solutions.
...
Translate business problems into data-driven approaches and scalable analytical solutions.
...
Perform data exploration, preprocessing, and feature engineering to ensure high-quality inputs for modeling.
...
Develop, optimize, and benchmark models using appropriate metrics and validation strategies.
...
Build and experiment with LLM-powered systems, including agentic workflows and RAG.
...
Investigate, reproduce, and compare research prototypes and state-of-the-art methods.
...
Collaborate with engineering teams to support the integration of models into production.
...
Monitor and analyze model performance and iterate to improve accuracy and robustness.
...
Bachelor’s degree/ Master's degree in Computer Science or related.
...
2-5 years of experience as a Data Scientist.
...
2–5 years of experience in Python (including complex applications), Machine Learning, and LLMs.
...
Strong background in data science, statistics, and analytical problem-solving.
...
Intermediate proficiency in FastAPI, Celery, and Keycloak.
...
Intermediate proficiency in PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, and Hugging Face.
...
Proficiency in Natural Language Processing (NLP), including tokenization and named entity recognition (NER).
...
In-depth understanding of Artificial Intelligence principles.
...
Strong working knowledge of Microsoft O365 tools.
